prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-20ITLWAC-10PC-STD-RD Product Type: CABLE_OR_ADAPTER Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 10pc Insulated Test Lead with Alligator Clips Set 20 Inch Description: Each 20" test lead in this 10 pack has two crimped, insulated 1.5" alligator clips with springs for a safe, secure hold. The leads feature red, green, black, white, and yellow 22 gauge insulation to prevent shorting or a dangerous shock.

These test leads with alligator clips are perfect for electronics, circuits, automotive, batteries, and electrical projects. Be sure to have these around the next time you need safe and reliable assistance for an electrical project. Search Terms: electrical wires leads testing Features: - Lead Length: 19 1/2 - Alligator Clip Length: 1 1/2 - Each Testing Lead Has 2 Alligator Clips - Alligator Clips are Crimped - 22 Gauge Protective Insulation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10-pc 20 Inch Test Lead Alligator Clips

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 10-Pk 20 In Insulated Test Leads With Alligator Clips

tokens.name: Insulated Test Leads With Alligator Clips

anthropic.title_differentiation: 22 Gauge Insulated, Crimped Clips, Multi-Color, Safe Electrical Testing, Electronics And Automotive Projects

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Pack, 20 Inch Leads, Crimped Alligator Clips, 22 Gauge Insulation, Secure Spring Grip, Color Coded
